steps.title: Spot the cause-and-effect relationship
steps.content: The passage describes a technique (smothering the flame), then immediately states the outcome it produces (the shiny black hue).

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: ”As a result” signals cause-and-effect: the smothering technique produces the black hue. The other choices express contrast, provide an example, or reference the past, none fitting a direct causal relationship. That matches choice D — D is correct.
